---
name: Release / QA
about: Release readiness, QA review, milestone closure, or public release notes
title: "[Release] "
labels: "type: release, status: needs-triage"
assignees: ""
---

## Release Goal

What version, milestone, or release candidate is being reviewed?

## Scope

- Included:
- Excluded:

## Quality Checklist

- [ ] Acceptance criteria for included Issues are satisfied.
- [ ] Relevant tests/builds/checks are complete.
- [ ] Documentation and known limitations are current.
- [ ] User-facing behavior is reviewed.
- [ ] Release notes are drafted.
- [ ] Open blockers or accepted risks are listed.

## Owner Approval

The project owner manually approves closure and public release.

## Related Milestone / Issues

List milestone, Issues, pull requests, and deployment links.

## Verification / Evidence

Add test output, screenshots, deployment links, and release notes.
